description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Core that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to run a build job on multiple operating systems (ubuntu-20.04, windows-latest, macos-latest) and Python versions (3.6 to 3.11). For each job, check out the repository with submodules, set up the corresponding Python version, install dependencies with pip and tox, and run various tox commands for core system info, Python linting, and integration tests. Send a Slack notification on job failure.
